allow: PowerShell(npm run lint 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12; Write-Output "==== BACKEND DIST ===="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse backend/dist -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "==== FRONTEND DIST ===="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse frontend/dist -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Resolve-Path frontend/dist\).Path + '\\',''\) })
